parameters.query:
UPDATE assets SET
  http_status = {{ $json.status_code }},
  tech_stack = ARRAY[{{ $json.tech_stack.map(t => "'" + t + "'").join(',') || "'unknown'" }}],
  last_tested = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.asset_id }}';

  last_tested = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.asset_id }}';
